title: olearia subspicata
intro: Olearia subspicata, also known as tree daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, characterized by its white or pink daisy-like flowers and silvery-green foliage. The medicinal properties of Olearia subspicata include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of consuming Olearia subspicata are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Olearia subspicata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Australian medicine to promote overall well-being.
